title: Physical Explosions
description: This datapack makes explosions physical and realistic! 💥
body:
### This is alpha, there are only physical explosions, no support for survival balance.

## ⚙️ Installation
**For the datapack to WORK**, you need to install the [MIDWUT(click)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/midwut) core datapack!
#
## 📖 About
Now, when TNT or creeper explodes, the blocks around it will fly apart!

### Features:
- Includes triggers for enabling and disabling features;
  - `phys_expl.tnt` and `phys_expl.creeper`
- Physical explosion from any tnt, if this feature is enabled;
- Physical explosion from an **ignited** creeper, if this feature is enabled.

This first alpha includes a fixed radius for converting blocks into falling ones - **3.5** blocks from the center of the explosion. Also, checking any creeper explosion is simply impossible, so the blocks will fly apart only from an ignited creeper with a Flint and Steel.

#
## 🔗 Links
You can leave a comment on the PMC page!

[![PMC](https://www.planetminecraft.com/images/layout/themes/modern/planetminecraft_logo.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/physical-explosions/)

Russian discord server of datapackers / Русский дискорд сервер датапакеров

Если вы датапакер, ищите адекватной помощи, полезных ресурсов и возможности поделиться проектами, то вам на [СвинСоюз: Датапаки](https://discord.gg/YNsUzsxyu5)!
Это сервер-ответвление от изначального заброшенного сервера ZeroCaty "СвинСоюз". Сейчас мы не имеем к нему никакого отношения.

[![SvinSoyuz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afb7cdcc943fceaa9f901c538ccfe15ea357f383.png)](https://discord.gg/YNsUzsxyu5)
